summary: The diff implements all five requirements (REQ-149 through REQ-153) with high fidelity. Three timeframe upload slots with independent input methods, sessionStorage persistence under the correct keys, multi-image processing in ProcessingScreen, updated TypeScript interfaces, and a conditional multi-timeframe card row in Results are all present. One minor gap exists: the 'SEM ENTRADA' signal label in TimeframeSummaryCard maps to 'NEUTRO' instead of 'SEM ENTRADA' as required by REQ-153 AC.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each card displays the signal as 'COMPRA ↑ / VENDA ↓ / SEM ENTRADA' for the neutral/no-entry case.
missing_requirements.reason: In TimeframeSummaryCard.tsx, the neutral signal label is rendered as 'NEUTRO' instead of 'SEM ENTRADA' as specified in the acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: Legacy 'chartImage' key is also written during handleProceed (storing the first filled slot's data URL) to support the Results page chart overlay.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-150 explicitly says to clear the old 'chartImage' key and only store per-timeframe keys. The diff stores the first image back under 'chartImage' as a legacy shim, which was not requested.
